module.name: security-ast
module.description: Shared AST helpers for defensive security-oriented rule implementations.

scenarios.name: should resolve identifiers and member expressions to stable names
scenarios.given: a rule inspects identifiers, member expressions, or object properties
scenarios.when: the helper can statically read the name
scenarios.then: the helper returns the extracted name or dotted path

scenarios.name: should detect static and dynamic string expressions
scenarios.given: a rule inspects literals, expression-free templates, interpolated templates, or concatenations
scenarios.when: the helper evaluates the expression shape
scenarios.then: static strings are returned as text and dynamic strings are identified

scenarios.name: should detect option object properties
scenarios.given: a rule inspects an object expression used as an options argument
scenarios.when: the helper evaluates property names and literal true values
scenarios.then: matching properties are reported as present
